ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_row_loc" INTEGER /* Row location of the trade in the trading log */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_total" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_min_trade_penalty" INTEGER /* Penalty for minimum trade */,
  "trade_buy_penalty" REAL /* Penalty for buying cryptocurrency */,
  "trade_hold_penalty" REAL /* Penalty for holding cryptocurrency */,
  "trade_trend_reward" REAL /* Reward for trend-based trading */,
  "trade_reward" REAL /* Reward for the trade */,
  "overall_reward" REAL /* Overall reward for the trade */,
  "trade_profit" REAL /* Profit from the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the trade was made */,
  "trade_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the trade was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Current net worth of the account */,
  "crypto_holding" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency held in the account */,
  "crypto_worth" REAL /* Value of the cryptocurrency held in the account */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency linked to the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction in the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "crypto_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Price change over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that owns the holding */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being held */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the holding was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that made the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the trade was made */,
  "trade_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the trade was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade that incurred the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., trading fee, withdrawal fee) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being benchmarked */,
  "benchmark_date" TEXT /* Date of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_source" TEXT /* Source of the benchmark data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts_benchmarks" (
  "account_benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account benchmark entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being benchmarked */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "account_benchmark_date" TEXT /* Date of the account benchmark */,
  "account_benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the account benchmark */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_source" TEXT /* Source of the benchmark data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_benchmarks_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_benchmarks_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analysis" (
  "trade_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade analysis entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being analyzed */,
  "highest_net_worth" REAL /* Highest net worth achieved by the trade */,
  "total_fees" REAL /* Total fees incurred by the trade */,
  "total_volume_traded" REAL /* Total volume traded by the trade */,
  "trade_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trade */,
  "trade_performance" REAL /* Performance metric for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
